title: Fallen Sword II
short_description: Turn-based fantasy adventure rooted in retro RPG traditions — realms, dungeons, and destiny as Erildath’s Champion.
description: Fallen Sword II is a turn-based fantasy adventure inspired by retro RPGs. Rise as Erildath's new Champion and journey through fantastical realms and perilous dungeons. Fight the darkness, break the cycle, and save the world.
